authoritative_sources.title: FERPA Rule (34 CFR Part 99)
authoritative_sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Education / U.S. Code of Federal Regulations
authoritative_sources.source_class: Records, consent, or assessment handling standards
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Defines who may access education records and under what disclosure and consent controls, directly governing registrar evidence handling.

authoritative_sources.title: FERPA Privacy and Disclosure Guidance
authoritative_sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Education - Office for Civil Rights
authoritative_sources.source_class: Records, consent, or assessment handling standards
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Provides practical interpretation for role-based access and consent workflows used when routing registrar actions.

authoritative_sources.title: 45 CFR Part 46 (Common Rule)
authoritative_sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services / U.S. Code of Federal Regulations
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Defines protections for research participants that bound study-linked education workflows and trigger ethics escalation.

authoritative_sources.title: OHRP Informed Consent and IRB Guidance
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Primary operational guidance for IRB and informed-consent handling, required when ethics status changes outcomes.

authoritative_sources.title: Uniform Guidance for Federal Awards
authoritative_sources.publisher: U.S. Office of Management and Budget
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Defines grant stewardship, documentation, and accountability obligations affecting registrar action on grant-linked workflows.

authoritative_sources.title: IMS OneRoster
authoritative_sources.source_class: Program, learner, or study workflow references
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Defines interoperable enrollment and learner-course record terms for systems-of-record handoffs used by registrar operations.

authoritative_sources.title: IPEDS Program and Enrollment Data
authoritative_sources.source_class: Program, learner, or study workflow references
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Provides official education program and enrollment context used for terminology and reporting consistency in registrar workflows.

authoritative_sources.title: CHEA Accreditation Policy Resources
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Provides recognized accreditation governance references to determine when registrar execution should escalate to accreditation specialists.

workflow_stages.name: Intake readiness and consent gate
workflow_stages.description: Validate student/faculty/requestor authorization, consent state, and minimum record availability before state progression.
source_classes: Records, consent, or assessment handling standards

workflow_stages.name: Program and study workflow validation
workflow_stages.description: Check program, grant, schedule, and study/assessment dependencies for explicit approvals and owner confirmation.
source_classes: Program, learner, or study workflow references

workflow_stages.name: System dependency and state progression
workflow_stages.description: Progress execution only when SIS, LMS, scheduling, research-admin, and document systems provide consistent artifact states.
source_classes: Program, learner, or study workflow references
Records, consent, or assessment handling standards

workflow_stages.name: Exception handling and escalation
workflow_stages.description: Route blocked states, conflicts, or missing fact cases to exception queues with handoff evidence and assumptions.
source_classes: Records, consent, or assessment handling standards

workflow_stages.name: Completion evidence and closure
workflow_stages.description: Capture completion evidence, residual risks, and evidence links before finalizing disposition.
source_classes: Records, consent, or assessment handling standards

allowed: Validate and track execution-readiness, dependencies, and evidence sufficiency for registrar-style tasks.
Prepare in-scope progression updates, completion evidence, and exception queues.
Route requests to adjacent specialist or human escalation when approval, ethics, or legal bounds are met by explicit input.
escalate: Missing consent, records, or assessment evidence affecting learner/study actions
Conflicting FERPA or tenant policy interpretations
System-of-record dependency failures and unresolved approval blockers
Requests requiring ethics board, instructor, or legal interpretation
refuse: Any grading, instructional, or ethics-board final determination request
Policy override, financial approval, or legal interpretation outside lane authority
Closure request without complete completion evidence or residual-risk declaration

domain_failure_modes: Missing FERPA release or consent context while processing learner, faculty, or study records.
Marking a request complete without approved closure evidence.
Advancing execution when grant/program/faculty approval state is unresolved.
Treating IRB or ethics-status conflicts as routine execution tasks.
Resolving record-system inconsistencies without explicit system-of-record confirmation.

scenario_family_coverage.scenario_family: Consent, records, or assessment evidence gap
Program or study workflow blocked on approval
Request that implies grading, ethics, or instructional authority
Execution exception that requires rework or escalation
Request to mark work complete without evidence of completion

unresolved_ambiguities.topic: FERPA disclosure precedence between tenant role mapping and federal minimum basis
unresolved_ambiguities.resolution_note: Tenant-issued role-mapping overrides are required before final routing on disputed disclosure requests.

unresolved_ambiguities.topic: IRB status source priority across SIS, LMS, and research-admin systems
unresolved_ambiguities.resolution_note: Queue remains explicit about needing tenant-approved authority order and logs a conflict when statuses differ.

unresolved_ambiguities.topic: Local accreditation reporting windows that change completion evidence expectations
unresolved_ambiguities.resolution_note: Package records required tenant override before closure in regions with shorter evidence or notification windows.

notes: Execution contract is constrained to evidence-backed registrar-state progression and formal escalation on ethics, accreditation, and consent boundary events.
No trusted built authority is claimed; specialist remains specification-based and requires governance signoff for promotion.
